title: hyparrhenia niariensis var. macrarrhena
intro: Hyparrhenia niariensis var. macrarrhena is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly found in various parts of the world and is used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating wounds. Hyparrhenia niariensis var. macrarrhena can be prepared into teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
